description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, armored design with a robust shell composed of interlocking panels and reinforced sections. The exterior is predominantly dark gray with black and metallic accents, highlighted by intricate surface detailing and mechanical elements. Prominent ventilation grills and circular intake vents are visible on the top and sides, while the rear showcases two large mesh-covered exhaust ports and coiled tubing. The helmet's lower section is reinforced with additional plating and features a chin guard, while the sides display embedded circular components and cable routing. The overall form is aerodynamic and protective, suggesting advanced technology and high durability. The interior appears padded and contoured for comfort, with visible mesh and cushioning.
description: A futuristic, armored helmet with dark gray and black panels, mechanical detailing, and prominent ventilation features. The design is robust, with visible tubing, mesh vents, and reinforced plating.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's armored faceplate, central vent, and symmetrical mechanical detailing with visible intake vents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular intake vent, coiled tubing, and embedded mechanical components along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two large mesh-covered exhaust ports, coiled tubing, and reinforced back plating.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the intake vent, tubing, and detailed side paneling.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Multiple ventilation openings: three small rectangular vents on the top front, two large circular intake vents on the sides, and two large mesh-covered exhaust ports at the rear. Vents are symmetrically distributed for airflow.
